personal.name: Baddela Raju
personal.education: MSc Data Science, Roehampton University, London (Oct 2024 – Jan 2026, Completed)
personal.context: Recent MSc graduate actively job hunting in the competitive London AI/ML market. Works Amazon Associate night shifts to financially support himself while job hunting. Highly motivated, technically deep, and determined to land a role that matches his expertise.

work_schedule.shift_note: On Amazon shift days Raju has very limited time for job applications. Even 5-10 quality applications is a great achievement. Be understanding and encouraging — do NOT pressure with the full 25-job goal.
work_schedule.weekend_note: Saturdays and Sundays have lower recruiter activity. Fewer responses expected. Encourage quality over quantity and company research.

ai_engineer.title: AI / Generative AI Engineer
ai_engineer.summary: AI Engineer with hands-on experience building production-ready, end-to-end Generative AI and Agentic AI systems. Specialises in LLM fine-tuning (SFT, DPO, QLoRA), RAG pipeline design (hybrid retrieval, reranking, RAGAS evaluation), and multi-agent architectures using LangGraph and MCP. Proven ability to take AI systems from research to deployment with measurable metric improvements, CI/CD regression gating, and scalable MLOps practices.
skills: LangChain, LangGraph, LlamaIndex, CrewAI, AutoGen, Hugging Face
RAG, Agentic RAG, Graph RAG, Prompt Engineering, MCP, RAGAS, LangSmith
LLM Fine-Tuning: SFT, PEFT, LoRA, QLoRA, DPO, GRPO, RLHF, RLAIF
Unsloth, LlamaFactory, Axolotl, TRL
Vector DBs: FAISS, Pinecone, ChromaDB, Neo4j
OpenAI API, Claude/Anthropic API, Gemini API, function calling
Multi-Agent Systems, ReAct Agents, Memory-Augmented Agents, Tool-Using Agents
PyTorch, TensorFlow, Keras, Scikit-Learn, XGBoost
MLOps: MLflow, DVC, W&B, LangSmith, GitHub Actions CI/CD, Docker, Kubernetes, Airflow
AWS (EC2, S3, SageMaker, Lambda), Azure, GCP
FastAPI, Flask, Streamlit, PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, Redis
Python, SQL, Power BI, Matplotlib

highlights: Built production Multimodal RAG pipeline (PDF/DOCX/PPTX/TXT + OCR + Gemini summarisation)
Hybrid retrieval: FAISS + BM25 with cross-encoder reranking for top-5 relevance
Automated RAGAS CI/CD gating (faithfulness ≥0.85, relevance ≥0.80, precision ≥0.75, recall ≥0.70)
LangSmith observability: query tracing, latency p50/p95/p99, token cost monitoring

projects.name: Agentic AI Video Synthesizer
highlights: 8-agent LangGraph pipeline: Question Decomposer, React Supervisor, YouTube, Tavily, arXiv, Completeness, Synthesis, Feedback
Tri-modal retrieval: YouTube transcripts, Tavily web, arXiv papers — 15+ sources per query
Llama 4 Maverick via Groq — 6-10 min script, self-scoring 1-10, auto-rewrite up to 3 iterations
D-ID avatar video, Google TTS, Streamlit UI, LangSmith tracing

projects.name: Domain-Specific LLM Fine-Tuning
highlights: 3-stage pharma pipeline on TinyLlama-1.1B, 4-bit QLoRA, ~1.1M params (~0.18%), T4 GPU <6GB
DPO on 400 pharma preference pairs — improved alignment, reduced hallucinations
Unsloth (2x faster), LlamaFactory, Axolotl, FSDP scaling

projects.name: Multimodal MCP Research Assistant
highlights: Whisper STT + Gemini Vision, 5-node LangGraph ReAct agent
MCP tools: Tavily search, arXiv, sandboxed Python, FAISS semantic memory
FastAPI SSE streaming + Google TTS — full voice-in/voice-out
3-layer memory: MemorySaver (short-term), SQLite (persistent), FAISS IndexFlatIP (semantic)

projects.name: Multimodal RAG System
highlights: FAISS IVFFlat (1024 clusters) + BM25 + cross-encoder reranking (ms-marco-MiniLM-L-6-v2)
RAGAS CI/CD gating via GitHub Actions
LangSmith observability with Gemini token cost monitoring

certifications: Building RAG Agents with LLMs – Nvidia (2025)

data_analyst.title: Data Analyst
data_analyst.summary: Data Analyst with hands-on experience across the full analytics lifecycle — data cleaning, EDA, SQL querying, interactive dashboard development, and strategic reporting. Proven ability to merge multi-source datasets, engineer features, and surface actionable insights across sales, retail, and hospitality domains.
skills: Python, SQL, Advanced Excel (Pivot Tables, XLOOKUP, INDEX MATCH, VLOOKUP, Power Pivot, Power Query)
Power BI, Tableau, DAX, Star Schema Modelling, Dashboard Development, Executive Reporting
EDA, Data Cleaning, Feature Engineering, Statistical Analysis, Hypothesis Testing, A/B Testing
KPI Reporting, Forecasting, Trend Analysis, Customer Segmentation, Correlation Analysis
PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB — Joins, CTEs, Window Functions, Aggregations, Views, Stored Procedures
NumPy, Pandas, SciPy, Matplotlib, Seaborn, Plotly
Scikit-Learn, XGBoost, MLOps basics, AWS, FastAPI, Flask, Streamlit

highlights: Analysed 5,000+ customer records in Python/Excel for marketing insights (NSW and Victoria)
Built K-means segmentation model for targeted marketing campaigns
Created Tableau dashboard (8 visualisations) — reporting time cut from 2 days to 2 hours

projects.name: Regional Sales Analytics Dashboard (Acme Co. USA)
highlights: End-to-end EDA on 64,104 orders (2014–2018), 175 customers, 30 products, 47 US states, 3 channels
Merged 6 raw tables (Sales Orders, Customers, Products, Regions, State Regions, 2017 Budgets)
$1.2bn revenue, $461.8M profit, 37.36% margin, 64K orders
Seasonal cycling $24M–$26M, May–June peaks; Products 26&25 = ~25% revenue; CA = $228.8M (19.5%)
3-page Power BI dashboard with cross-page slicers; 5 strategic recommendations

projects.name: Customer Shopping Behaviour Analysis
highlights: EDA on 3,900 retail transactions (18 features) in Python + PostgreSQL
10 SQL queries: revenue by gender, top 5 products by rating, CTE segmentation (Loyal:3116/Returning:701/New:83)
Male revenue $157,890 vs Female $75,191; Young Adults led ($62,143); only 27% subscribed
Power BI dashboard: KPI cards (3.9K customers, $59.76 avg purchase, 3.75 avg rating)

projects.name: Revenue Insights — AtliQ Grands (Hospitality)
highlights: Star-schema across 5 tables (134,590 bookings, 25 properties, 4 cities, May–Jul)
26 DAX measures: Revenue, Occupancy%, ADR, RevPAR, DSRN, Realisation%, WoW change%
₹1.69bn revenue — Luxury 61.6%, Mumbai ₹668M, Delhi occupancy 60.5%
24.8% cancellation rate; weekend RevPAR (₹7,972) > weekday (₹7,083)
